response:
Subject: Request to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent account block due to suspicious payments that I did not make. The block has caused significant inconvenience, and I am requesting immediate unblocking.  

I am a regular user of Google services and have never engaged in any fraudulent activity. The payments in question were made by third parties, and I have no connection to them. I would like to provide additional information to clarify the situation.  

Please review the details and consider unblocking my account to restore access to my services. I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
